plan_review_notes: Plan matches the implemented scope: promotion-aware close gating in closeout, explicit promotion_pending workflow parking, workflow auto-loop stop behavior, and focused plus broader regression coverage.

plan_review_history.notes: Aligned the task docs with the implemented close gate change: closeout now blocks promotable verified tasks until promotion reaches a recorded terminal state, parks them in workflow_phase=promotion_pending and stage=promotion, and the workflow daemon stops auto-looping on that phase.

Plan matches the implemented scope: promotion-aware close gating in closeout, explicit promotion_pending workflow parking, workflow auto-loop stop behavior, and focused plus broader regression coverage.

spec_review_notes: Froze the closeout contract: verified tasks with promotion.required stay in promotion_pending until promotion_recorded, close still succeeds once promotion is recorded, and workflow auto-loop no longer churns on that parked state.

normal_cases.name: Verified tasks with promotion still pending remain open in `promotion_pending` instead of closing.
Verified tasks whose promotion is `promotion_recorded` still close successfully.

edge_cases.name: Workflow auto-loop does not reprocess tasks already parked in `promotion_pending`.
Existing closeout behavior for non-promotable verified tasks still works.

exception_cases.name: Closeout still surfaces explicit close gates when verification is missing or promotion is incomplete.

verification_methods.target: Verified tasks with promotion still pending remain open in promotion_pending instead of closing
Verified tasks whose promotion is promotion_recorded still close successfully
Workflow auto-loop does not reprocess tasks already parked in promotion_pending
Existing closeout behavior for non-promotable verified tasks still works
Closeout still surfaces explicit close gates when verification is missing or promotion is incomplete
Shared workflow, MCP, evolution, and golden-template paths stay stable after the close gate change
verification_methods.method: env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/python -m unittest tests.test_sisyphus tests.test_mcp_server tests.test_mcp_core tests.test_mcp_adapter tests.test_evolution tests.test_golden
